title: Dry-staple ration and nutrition board
summary: Count people, age and health needs, cooking fuel, water, allergens, expiry, and calories only as one part of a balanced plan.
content: Count people, age and health needs, cooking fuel, water, allergens, expiry, and calories only as one part of a balanced plan. Set a review date and protect extra portions for illness, pregnancy, heavy work, and delayed resupply. Do not create a starvation ration while edible stock is being lost to poor inventory or spoilage.
